creator: akrus@flygroup.st
text:
Currently p5-FusionInventory-Agent port is at version 2.1.13 whereas CPAN already has 2.1.14 and 2.2.0. Also the current port required to build and install CUPS module and some others, but they're not required to build/run the agent. The patch attached updates the port & allows you to select only options you need.

(sorry if something is wrong with styling, this is my first port patch)

Fix: Check the attached file.

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: # cd /usr/ports/net-mgmt/p5-FusionInventory-Agent/
# make install clean
